view.title: Buka iWebhusayithi {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuthuma kabusha i-imeyili yamukelekile?
view.emailSentMessage: I-imeyili yamukelekile ithunyelwe kabusha. Hlola ibhokisi lakho lokungenayo.

buyIp.title: Thenga Isithasiselo Se-IP Esengeziwe
buyIp.costDescription: Intengo ({symbol}) nyanga zonke njengoba iwebhusayithi yakho ibhalelwa
buyIp.confirmMessage: Intengo ye-IP ezengeziwe: {symbol}{cost}/inyanga. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuoda i-IP ezengeziwe?

migration.title: Fudukisa Iwebhusayithi Yakho
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Uma isayithi iphila / isayithi ebaningi enethrafikhi ephezulu, singabeka ikhasi lokuhlala ngesikhathi sokufudukiswa?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Ingabe le sayithi inaizidingo ezikhethekile njenge-PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Uyafuna futhi ukusisiza ukudlulisa ukubhalisa igama ledomeini?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Uyafuna ukubuyekeza amaseva amagama ngokushesha ngemuva kokuphetha ukufudukiswa kwedatha?
migration.note1: Ukugcwalisa leli fomu kuzovula ithikithi elisha lomnyango wethu wosekelo ukuqala ukufudukiswa kwakho.
migration.note2: Sicela ube ephelele nangokuqinisekile ukukugwema izibambezelo.
migration.note3: Ukufudukiswa okujwayelekile kuphothulwa phakathi ngehora eli-48 kuya ku-72. Ngezinye izikhathi isikhathi esingaphezu kwalokho uma ubungako bedatha okukhopyiwa bukhulu.
migration.note4: I-akhawunti endala yokusingatha idinga ukuba ku-intanethi futhi itholakale ngesikhathi sokukhokha ukufudukiswa, ngaphandle kwalokho singabhekkana nobunzima.
migration.note5: Sicela ungabi nezibuyekezo kusayithi yakho ngesikhathi sokukhokha ukufudukiswa, ngaphandle kwalokho leyo datha ingeke ikhopyiwe esingathweni esisha.
